name: GitHub PR to Slack Review
purpose: Notify Slack when a PR is opened, synchronized, or reopened, including the GitHub PR merge link and linked Plane context.

security.recommended: Validate X-Hub-Signature-256 using the GitHub webhook secret stored in n8n credentials.

credentials: Optional Plane API credential in n8n

nodes.name: PR action needs review notification
nodes.condition: action is opened, synchronize, reopened, or ready_for_review

outputs.issue_url: First GitHub issue URL found in PR body or branch metadata
outputs.plane_url: First Plane URL found in PR or linked issue body

nodes.name: Fetch latest check status
nodes.on_error: Continue with check_status set to unavailable.

nodes.name: Fetch linked issue details
nodes.request: GET linked issue when issue_url is present

nodes.name: Comment on Plane with PR link
nodes.request: Add Plane comment containing PR URL and current checks status.
nodes.on_error: Continue and include Plane update failure note in Slack.

nodes.name: Send PR review message
nodes.on_error: Respond 502 so GitHub webhook delivery can be retried.

safe_failure_handling: Reject requests with invalid GitHub signatures.
Do not block Slack notification if checks are not available yet; mark checks as pending or unavailable.
Do not expose webhook secrets in failed workflow logs.
Use GitHub webhook retries for transient Slack failures.
Keep Plane update optional so the review notification still reaches Slack.
